details.test: Task 1: Cheapest 2-night corporate retreat with team-building
Task 2: Cheapest full-day event space for 40 participants with projector and natural light
Task 3: Weekend retreat registration within 3 months under $600 with vegetarian meals
Task 4: Catering order for 30 guests with vegetarian main and per-person $40-$50
Task 5: Compare first two room types by rating and book 3 rooms under $250/night
Task 6: Same-day booking for one main hall and two additional rooms for full-day workshop
Task 7: Wedding quote request for 100 guests with garden ceremony and indoor reception
Task 8: Purchase digital gift certificate for 1-night stay for two with spa access under $400
Task 9: One-day conference agenda with 3 sessions assigned to rooms and times
